proof_boundary: This eval suite validates execution-loop structure. It does not replace lane-specific tests or runtime smoke checks.

rows.pass_condition: All required sections are present in the workflow contract.

rows.measurement: git fetch origin && git merge-base --is-ancestor origin/main HEAD
rows.pass_condition: Branch contains origin/main or is rebased before merge.
Required fields are complete and evidence-backed.
Continuation plan exists and proves the next evidence lanes before final product claims.
VC pitch packet is ready for private investor conversations without claiming launch, revenue, PMF, compliance, buyer, supplier, customs, tariff, or financing proof.

Board packet is ready for controlled private beta decisioning without claiming public launch, production deployment, legal, financial, compliance, buyer, revenue, PMF, supplier, customs, or tariff proof.

rows.measurement: scripts/agentic_workflow_orchestrator.py harness-intake --harness ecc --install-mode observe --target-repo ai-development-os --out-dir system_review_graph
rows.pass_condition: Harness packet is generated without opening install, network-write, paid, credential, push, deploy, legal, or launch gates.
Target main branch is clean after passing checks and push.
